title: Premium package short-lived download grant (v1alpha2)
description: Short-lived, signed authorization to fetch a restricted (verified-premium / private-organization) package artifact. TARGET-STATE contract. This is NOT DRM: it authorizes a download for a bounded window against an active entitlement. The artifact itself carries no lock; the moat is licensing, updates and support, not technical copy prevention. Once downloaded, the artifact is verified with its own cosign/minisign signature (v1alpha1/nexus.pack). Carries NO secret values (references and a detached signature only).

grant_id.description: Opaque, single-use grant identifier. Not a standing credential.

expires_at.description: Short window (minutes). The gateway rejects the grant after this instant.

scope.description: The restricted entitlement scope this grant was issued against (e.g. 'verified-premium:legal-vertical'). Free lanes (public/community) are direct_download and never use a grant, so only restricted scopes are accepted here.

artifact_ref.description: Reference/handle the client resolves against the CDN/access gateway. Not the bytes.

download_url.description: Optional pre-authorized, expiring URL. A reference, not a secret.

max_uses.description: A grant is single-use by construction: the grant_id is redeemable exactly once. REQUIRED and pinned to 1 (no implicit default) so the single-use property is auditable on the wire; standing multi-use grants are not issued.

signature.description: Ed25519 detached signature over the canonicalised grant, verifiable against the pinned Hub key.
